# Mtoto Por Tours - Zanzibar Tours & Tanzania Safaris

> Mtoto Por Tours is a trusted tour operator based in Zanzibar, Tanzania, offering unforgettable tours, safaris, car rentals, and travel services across Zanzibar and mainland Tanzania.

## About Us

Mtoto Por Tours specializes in creating memorable travel experiences in Zanzibar and Tanzania. We are a locally-owned and operated company with deep knowledge of the region, offering authentic cultural experiences, wildlife adventures, and relaxing beach holidays.

Our services include:
- Zanzibar island tours (Stone Town, spice farms, beaches)
- Tanzania mainland safaris (Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Selous, Mikumi)
- Car rentals and airport transfers
- Custom travel packages
- Professional English-speaking guides

## Main Offerings

### Zanzibar Tours
- [Safari Blue Tour](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/safari-blue-tour) - Full-day ocean adventure with dhow sailing, snorkeling, and seafood feast
- [Spice Farm Tour](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/spice-farm-tour) - Explore Zanzibar's famous spice plantations
- [Stone Town Tour](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/stone-town-tour) - UNESCO World Heritage site walking tour
- [Prison Island Tour](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/prison-island-tour) - Giant tortoises and historical site
- [Jozani Forest Tour](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/jozani-forest-tour) - Red colobus monkeys and mangrove boardwalk
- [Dolphin Tour](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/dolphin-tour) - Swim with dolphins at Kizimkazi
- [Mnemba Snorkeling](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/mnemba-snorkeling) - Premium snorkeling at Mnemba Atoll
- [Sunset Dhow Cruise](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/zanzibar-tours/sunset-dhow-cruise) - Traditional sailing at sunset

### Tanzania Safaris
- [One-Day Selous Safari](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/1-day-selous-safari) - Day trip to Africa's largest game reserve
- [One-Day Mikumi Safari](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/1-day-mikumi-safari) - Day trip from Zanzibar
- [2 Days Selous Fly-In Safari](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/2-days-selous-safari) - Extended wildlife adventure
- [2 Days Mikumi Drive-In Safari](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/2-days-mikumi-safari) - Compact safari experience
- [2 Days Tarangire & Ngorongoro](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/2-days-tarangire-ngorongoro-safari) - UNESCO World Heritage safari
- [3 Days Serengeti + Tarangire + Ngorongoro](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/3-days-serengeti-tarangire-ngorongoro-safari) - Ultimate Tanzania safari
- [6 Days Northern Circuit Safari](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/6-days-tarangire-serengeti-ngorongoro-manyara-safari) - Complete northern circuit
- [Gombe 2 Days Chimpanzee Safari](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/tanzania-safaris/gombe-2-days-1-night-chimpanzee-safari) - Track wild chimpanzees

### Travel Packages
- [2 Days 1 Night Package](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/packages/2-days-1-night) - Quick Zanzibar introduction
- [3 Days 2 Nights Stone Town](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/packages/3-days-2-nights-stone-town) - Cultural immersion
- [3 Days 2 Nights Beach Holiday](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/packages/3-days-2-nights-beach) - Beach relaxation package
- [4 Days 3 Nights Package](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/packages/4-days-3-nights) - Comprehensive island experience
- [5 Days 4 Nights Safari Blue Special](https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz/packages/5-days-4-nights-safari-blue) - Premium beach holiday

### Additional Services
- Airport transfers (ZNZ Airport)
- Car rentals with driver
- Group transportation
- Custom itinerary planning
- Aviation support services
- Events management

- **Website**: https://www.mtotoportours.co.tz
- **Phone**: +255 717 079200
- **Email**: mtotoportours@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp**: +255 717 079200
- **Address**: Zanzibar, Tanzania

## Booking Information

All tours can be booked directly through our website booking form or via WhatsApp. We offer:
- Instant booking confirmation
- Flexible payment options
- Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure
- Hotel pickup and drop-off (most tours)
- Professional English-speaking guides

## Why Choose Mtoto Por Tours

1. **Local Expertise** - Born and raised in Zanzibar, we know every hidden gem
2. **Personalized Service** - Custom tours tailored to your interests
3. **Competitive Prices** - Best value for authentic experiences
4. **Professional Guides** - Knowledgeable, friendly, English-speaking staff
5. **Sustainable Tourism** - Supporting local communities and conservation
